summary: Tested IoT Smart Lighting feature. All 23 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for all tabs (Devices, Zones, Energy, Schedule). Minor frontend security issue: /iot route accessible by players (backend correctly returns 403, but frontend renders empty page instead of redirecting).

integration_issues.issue: /iot route doesn't have role restriction in App.js - player can navigate to page but sees empty dashboard (backend correctly returns 403)

design_issues.screen: Add Device Dialog / Add Zone Dialog
issues: Warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - add DialogDescription for accessibility

passed_tests: GET /api/iot/devices?venue_id= - List 7 devices for PowerPlay Arena (200)
GET /api/iot/devices - Super admin can list devices (200)
GET /api/iot/zones?venue_id= - List 3 zones with device count (200)
GET /api/iot/energy?venue_id=&period=7d - Energy analytics with 7 days data (200)
GET /api/iot/energy?venue_id=&period=30d - Energy analytics with 30 days data (200)
Player denied access to IoT zones (403)
Player denied access to energy analytics (403)
Super admin can access all IoT endpoints (200)
frontend_tests_passed: IoT Dashboard loads for venue owner with 7 device cards
Live stats bar shows online/active count, power draw, avg daily cost
Device toggle switch works (on/off)
Device brightness slider functional
Zones tab shows 3 zone cards with device counts
Zone All On/All Off buttons work
Energy tab shows analytics cards and charts (2 recharts)
Period selector (7d/30d) works
Schedule tab shows today's booking-linked schedules
Sync Bookings button works
Add Device dialog opens with all fields
Add Zone dialog opens with all fields
Super admin can access IoT dashboard
Super admin navbar has IoT link
Venue owner navbar has IoT link
Player navbar does NOT have IoT link (correct)
Mobile: IoT dashboard responsive
Mobile: Device cards display correctly
Mobile: Tabs work on mobile
Mobile: Bottom nav has IoT icon for venue owner
action_items: Add role restriction to /iot route in App.js: roles={['venue_owner', 'super_admin']}
Add DialogDescription to Add Device and Add Zone dialogs for accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend route /iot should have roles restriction to prevent players from accessing page (backend security is correct)
DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility compliance
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed devices and zones created and deleted during pytest run
context_for_next_testing_agent: IoT Smart Lighting feature fully working. PowerPlay Arena has 7 seeded devices and 3 zones. MQTT is SIMULATED via MQTTSimulator class (not real hardware). Energy analytics computed from device power ratings and booking counts. All device states persisted in MongoDB. Schedules are booking-linked with 5-min buffer before/after slots.

device_list.details: 7 devices for PowerPlay Arena, sorted by name

zone_control.details: All On/All Off controls all devices in zone

energy_analytics.details: 7d/30d period data with summary and daily breakdown

sync_bookings.details: Manual sync of today's bookings to IoT

auth_venue_owner.details: Full access to own venue's IoT

auth_super_admin.details: Full access to all venues' IoT

mobile_responsive.details: Mobile layout, bottom nav with IoT icon
